data.title: 国际服Blue Archive Steam愿望单活动
data.summary: [STEAM Client Release Celebration Event] Sensei! In celebration of Blue Archive's STEAM release, we
data.body:
[STEAM Client Release Celebration Event]

Sensei! In celebration of Blue Archive's STEAM release, we are introducing the Doki Doki Heart Milestone Event!

Whenever the number of people who added Blue Archive to their wishlist on the STEAM store page reaches a milestone, various gifts will be delivered to you! 💙

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2921199

#BlueArchive #BlueArvhiveSteam

![image.png](https://kivo.wiki/files/526/FmhlyMuTpo2hjOtgvfCqON0tGCJjb3t7.png)
